title: Ponta Delgada, Açores — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ponta Delgada, Açores: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ponta Delgada is a city in Açores with a population of 46,102. The largest city in the Azores archipelago, with volcanic landscapes, thermal springs, and a historic center on São Miguel Island.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
